case_title: THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. EDUARDO GONZALES

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-07-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GONZALES, EDUARDO $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,045.50, DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. PLAINTIFF ESTABLISHED THAT DEFENDANT OWES THE AMOUNT DEMANDED BACK FOR MEDICAL SERVICES RENDERED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALES, EDUARDO
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE FOR PROGRESS REPORT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-11-2017 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAR-07-2018 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF'S REPRESENTATIVE JOANNE ADAMS, SENIOR COLLECTIONS OFFICER FOR THE CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S OFFICE OF THE TREASURER/TAX COLLECTOR, AND DEFENDANT EDUARDO GONZALES. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. IF NEITHER PARTY APPEARS AT THE NEXT CALLING OF THE CASE ON 3/7/18, THE MATTER SHALL BE CONTINUED FOR ANOTHER SIX MONTHS, AND EVERY SIX MONTHS THEREAFTER, UNTIL THE OUTSTANDING BALANCE IS PAID IN FULL. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. (506).

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALES, EDUARDO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-11-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $45.50 SERVED JUL-16-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALES, EDUARDO
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-07-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-07-2018 BY PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE. PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY JOANNE ADAMS, COLLECTION SERVICES. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
